## Feature Proposal

Provide a clear description of the feature request or improvement.

## Problem Solved

Describe the problem or friction points this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision the feature being implemented. Include API schema sketches or UI changes if applicable.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, designs, or technical references here.
